applicant_age_decimal.description: Exact age calculated as (claim_submission_date - date_of_birth) in decimal years

applicant_gender.description: Biological sex as registered in Population Authority. Used for retirement age thresholds in income support fallback.

applicant_date_of_birth.description: Exact date of birth for age calculation

claim_submission_date.description: Date the citizen submits the eligibility claim

geospatial_evacuee_flag.description: True if applicant residential address intersects NEMA northern border evacuation polygon

disability_status_indicator.description: True if applicant holds active Person with Disabilities (PWD) status on claim date

idf_discharged_status.description: True if applicant completed mandatory IDF service within timeframe specified by Defense Service Law

employment_classification.description: Primary employment classification. Dual requires specialized branching.

chalath_commencement_date.description: Effective date unpaid leave began. Must fall within operational window for emergency overrides.

chalath_termination_date.description: Date of return to active payroll. Null means continuously active, requires monthly re-validation.

chalath_continuous_duration.description: Calculated as chalath_termination_date - chalath_commencement_date in calendar days. Must be >= 14 for standard emergency unemployment.

permitted_labor_days.description: Days worked during active chalath. Emergency framework allows up to 2 days without voiding continuous status.

akshara_base_months.description: Number of distinct calendar months with NI contributions in the preceding 18-month reference period

dynamic_akshara_threshold.description: Dynamically computed threshold. Default 6. Becomes 3 if idf_discharged_status or disability_status_indicator. Becomes 2 if geospatial_evacuee_flag.

maternity_protection_end.description: Statutory end of paid maternity plus 60-day protection window. Requires temporal freezing if chalath intersects.

spouse_reserve_days.description: Cumulative reserve duty days served by applicant's spouse/co-parent during operational period

child_age_minimum.description: Age of youngest dependent child. Used for spousal reserve 1-hour absence allowance (child must be under 13).

tofes_100_submitted.description: Whether employer has submitted Tofes 100 form via B2B API with precise leave dates

employment_service_registered.description: Whether applicant is registered with Employment Service (Shirut HaTaasuka)

social_contributions_maintained.description: Whether employer maintained pension/provident/training fund contributions during reserve mobilization

employee_reserve_days_march_2026.description: Total verified reserve days served by the employee specifically in March 2026

average_daily_wage_3_months.description: Employee average daily wage over 3 months preceding reserve service, used for employer compensation calc

wage_months_preceding_6.description: Array of 6 monthly salaried wages for the 6 months preceding cessation of work. Used for senior grant calculation.

employment_terminated_due_to_operation.description: Whether employment was demonstrably terminated or suspended due to operational impact

is_full_time_employee.description: Whether applicant is a full-time employee. Required for spousal reserve absence allowance.

transport_provider_license_valid.description: Whether the ambulance transport provider holds a valid Ministry of Transportation license

transported_via_licensed_ambulance.description: Whether the pregnant woman was transported to hospital via a licensed ambulance during the operation

pregnancy_preservation_active.description: Whether medical authorization for pregnancy preservation (Shmirat Herayon) is active during operational window

provident_fund_deposits_maintained.description: Whether employee maintained provident fund payments during eligibility period

independent_income_declared.description: Net independent revenue declared via CPA certification during operational period. Used for dual-status deduction.

cpa_certification_submitted.description: Whether CPA/Tax Consultant certification declaring net independent revenue has been submitted

overtime_weekly_extra_hours.description: Overtime hours logged in a given week during emergency overtime window

overtime_total_weekly_hours.description: Total hours (standard + overtime) logged in a given week

overtime_daily_hours.description: Total hours logged on a given day

overtime_monthly_extra_hours.description: Total overtime hours logged in the current calendar month

employee_consent_overtime.description: Whether employee has given explicit consent for overtime. Cannot be unilaterally mandated by employer.

applicant_is_alive.description: Population registry alive status. If false, claim terminates immediately.

chalath_months_continuous.description: Number of full calendar months of continuous unpaid leave. Used for NI premium liability routing.

receiving_unemployment_benefits.description: Whether applicant is currently receiving emergency unemployment disbursement. Used for NI premium liability routing.
